open_surfaces.label: Micro-Scene Observation Frame Readback
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10av readback: the ED-10au specimen opened and reads as a real scene, but expectation/review-frame clarity and subtitle/player-UI overlap remain classified warnings.

open_surfaces.label: Representative Micro-Scene Specimen Readback
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10au source specimen consumed by ED-10av: actual Japanese transcript content, verified same-machine MP4 access, and closed production/public gates.

open_surfaces.label: Open Representative Micro-Scene Specimen
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use later only when a supervisor asks to open the ED-10au internal review specimen MP4.

open_surfaces.label: Internal Review Observation Readback
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10at user observation readback: openability and cue visibility pass diagnostically, chopped/memo-like continuity is not production review, and no approval is inferred.

open_surfaces.label: Internal Review Video Candidate Access Sheet
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to find current-host full paths and the launcher for the ED-10ar internal review video candidate.

open_surfaces.label: Open Internal Review Video Candidate
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use later only when a supervisor asks to open the internal review candidate MP4.

open_surfaces.label: Internal Review Video Candidate Package
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ar internal review video candidate package without treating it as production or public-use approval.

open_surfaces.label: Production Limitation Lift Stage 5 User Decision Ready
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10aq stage-5 user-decision-ready source packet without asking for approval now.

open_surfaces.label: Production Limitation-Lift Stage 3 Owner-Review Prep
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ao owner-review preparation packet that converts ED-10an decision groups into future freeform decision topics without requesting approval now.

open_surfaces.label: Production Limitation-Lift Stage 2 Decision Packet
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10an decision-preparation packet that groups ED-10am gates into subtitle design/visual acceptance, production render readiness, and rights/publishing/public-use clearance without approving those decisions.

open_surfaces.label: Production Limitation-Lift Stage 1
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10am gate matrix that turns ED-10al diagnostic rehearsal evidence into production/public decision preparation without approving those decisions.

open_surfaces.label: Final Render Path Stage 3 Rehearsal
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10al diagnostic rehearsal, generated ignored ASS/MP4/manifest outputs, output metadata, style survival readback, and closed production/public gates.

open_surfaces.label: Final Render Path Stage 2 Replayability
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ak operation packet, replay inputs, ignored outputs, command family, fresh-clone absence behavior, and closed production/public gates.

open_surfaces.label: Final Render Path Stage 1
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10aj selected FFmpeg/libass path, stage-1 checklist, and closed production/public gates.

open_surfaces.label: Final Render Path Readiness
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ai readiness matrix before any later final render-path stage or limitation-lift route.

open_surfaces.label: Production Limitation-Lift Entry
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ah gate matrix that separates diagnostic render-path proof from production, rights, publishing, and public-use decisions.

open_surfaces.label: Render Readiness Separation
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect what ED-10ag proves, what remains unaccepted, and which later explicit milestone may trigger a render.

open_surfaces.label: Render Path Selector Probe
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10af L2 selector probe rows, local ignored ASS/MP4/manifest paths, and boundary readback from the ED-10ae contract.

open_surfaces.label: Lineage Observation Surface
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the restored dry-read predecessor, active ED-10af L2 probe, and local ignored ASS/MP4/manifest/contact-sheet readback.

open_surfaces.label: Render Path Selector Contract
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect which selector, family, palette, color, motion, and line-break fields a later render adapter would receive; this is L0 static readback, not an actual render pass.

open_surfaces.label: Style Family Palette Proof
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ad family and palette axes while body subtitle text color remains stable and palette changes stay on badge, accent, and backplate surfaces.

open_surfaces.label: Visual Selector Proof
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use to inspect the ED-10ab semantic presets as badge, accent, backplate, size, motion, and line-break token differences while body subtitle text color stays stable.

open_surfaces.label: Preset Selector
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use before visual selector work to inspect deterministic speaker, emotion, intensity, utterance role, and readability token mappings.

open_surfaces.label: Style Intent Registry
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use before future subtitle style work so speaker, emotion, intensity, utterance role, and readability tags map to presets instead of repeated tiny numeric review loops.

open_surfaces.label: Tiny Render-Path Probe
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as the ED-10z local readback that passes Candidate 2 through the current diagnostic render path while preserving Candidate 0 as fallback and Candidate 1/3 as held references.

open_surfaces.label: Multi-font Focused Review Reference
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as the accepted ED-10o same-line comparison reference; it does not mean final baseline or production acceptance.

open_surfaces.label: Known Font Pack
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use as ED-10l/ED-10n readback evidence that the requested per-user fonts resolve in the regenerated comparison.

open_surfaces.label: BIZ Proof Reference
open_surfaces.command: see artifact registry for archived previous proof paths
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use only as the reviewed ED-10k reference that explains why the system-safe BIZ route stopped; open-current-proof now points to ED-10r.

open_surfaces.label: Font Audit
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use only to audit the consumed ED-10j contact sheet and candidate mapping.

open_surfaces.label: Gothic Balance
open_surfaces.when_to_use: Use on the machine retaining ignored ED-10i comparison artifacts to judge gothic glyph body versus outline balance.
